_comment: Phase 4 Step 5 (v1.1) — live install marketplace index. Each entry has an `install` block that drives `skills.installFromUrl`: `ownerRepo` is the GitHub coordinate (`owner/repo`), optional `subPath` points at a SKILL.md inside a mono-repo, optional `ref` pins to a commit SHA / tag. The renderer Marketplace tab reads this file via fetch('marketplace/skills.json'). Schema fields: id, name, description, version, author, tags[], install{ownerRepo, ref?, subPath?}, repoUrl?, homepageUrl?, installInstructions?.

skills.name: MCP Server Builder
skills.description: Anthropic's reference skill for designing and shipping Model Context Protocol servers. Walks through tool design, schema discipline, and stdio vs HTTP trade-offs.
skills.author: anthropics

skills.name: PDF Author
skills.description: Generate clean, well-paginated PDFs from prompts. Frontmatter includes argument hints for page size, fonts, and a custom cover.
skills.author: anthropics

skills.name: DOCX Author
skills.description: Authoring + revision skill for Microsoft Word documents. Supports tracked changes, headings, and a strict outline mode for technical writers.
skills.author: anthropics

skills.name: Spreadsheet Author
skills.description: Generates and updates Excel-compatible spreadsheets. Handles formulas, named ranges, and freeze panes from natural-language descriptions.
skills.author: anthropics

skills.name: Slide Deck Author
skills.description: Builds PowerPoint-compatible slide decks from outlines. Supports speaker notes, master themes, and structured agenda generation.
skills.author: anthropics

skills.name: Skill Creator
skills.description: Meta-skill for authoring new SKILL.md packages. Inspects the active codebase, drafts frontmatter, and emits a starter folder layout.
skills.author: anthropics

skills.name: TDD Driver
skills.description: Drives strict red-green-refactor loops. Generates failing tests first, then minimal implementation, then refactors. Pairs well with Vitest, Jest, and Pytest.
skills.author: SigmaLink Labs

skills.name: Security Audit Pro
skills.description: Static-analysis prompt set covering OWASP Top 10, secret leakage, insecure deserialization, and supply-chain risks. Emits a triaged findings report.
skills.author: redteam-collective

skills.name: Performance Profiler
skills.description: Walks code paths, identifies hot loops, suggests memoization and structural rewrites. Flame-graph friendly; integrates with Chrome DevTools traces.
skills.author: perfworks

skills.name: Accessibility Coach
skills.description: WCAG 2.2 AA reviewer for React, Vue, and Svelte components. Calls out colour contrast, ARIA misuse, focus traps, and keyboard navigation gaps.
skills.author: a11y-friends

skills.name: Database Migration Safety
skills.description: Reviews up/down migrations for blocking locks, backfill correctness, and rollback safety. Postgres + MySQL; understands online-DDL gotchas.
skills.author: schema-stewards

skills.name: REST API Designer
skills.description: Coaches resource modelling, status-code hygiene, idempotency keys, and OpenAPI authoring. Generates request/response samples on demand.
skills.author: api-guild

skills.name: Code Review Buddy
skills.description: Diff-aware reviewer. Surfaces logic errors, missing tests, public-API regressions, and inconsistent naming. Honours your repo's CONTRIBUTING.md tone.
skills.author: SigmaLink Labs

skills.name: Doc Scribe
skills.description: Generates module-level docs, README sections, and architectural decision records. Stays under the line-budget you set.
skills.author: docs-foundation

skills.name: React Modernizer
skills.description: Codemods class components to hooks, refactors prop drilling into context, and migrates legacy lifecycle methods to effects without changing behaviour.
skills.author: frontend-forge

skills.name: Rust Borrow Checker Coach
skills.description: Guides you through borrow-checker errors with minimal-fix proposals. Knows the common idioms for `Cow`, `Rc<RefCell>`, and lifetime elision.
skills.author: rust-mentors

skills.name: Kubernetes YAML Doctor
skills.description: Lints Helm charts and raw manifests. Catches resource-limit drift, missing readiness probes, and namespace leaks before kubectl apply.
skills.author: cluster-ops

skills.name: GraphQL Schema Architect
skills.description: Reviews GraphQL schemas for N+1 risk, federation seams, and pagination consistency. Generates connection-cursor patterns from prose specs.
skills.author: graph-guild

skills.name: License Compliance Auditor
skills.description: Walks `package-lock.json` / `Cargo.lock` / `go.sum` and surfaces incompatible licenses (GPL leakage, AGPL surfaces, unattributed BSD).
skills.author: license-watch

skills.name: Spec by Example
skills.description: Authors executable specifications in Gherkin. Pairs scenarios with property-based tests; emits a coverage matrix linking specs to source files.
skills.author: behaviour-driven
